meeting_title: Mill Motive Solutions / Voxel - project evaluation status

safety_use_cases.label: Forklift–pedestrian proximity monitoring during renovation at Van Buren freezer
safety_use_cases.description: Deploy Voxel at the Van Buren freezer to monitor and mitigate interactions between pedestrians and lift trucks during a construction-related reroute that will cause congestion.

evidence.quote: Well, and also for that matter, timing-wise, we are going to be entering a rather large construction shutdown at, so the Van Buren freezers attached to our Van Buren cook facility.
evidence.speaker: Alex Hale <fake.alex.hale@millmotivesolutions.com>

evidence.quote: And the cook facility is going to be going through a significant renovation and part of it right at that time.
evidence.speaker: Alex Hale <fake.alex.hale@millmotivesolutions.com>

evidence.quote: And one of the things that we've been concerned about is the interface between pedestrians and lift traffic, lift truck traffic, during that particular time.
evidence.speaker: Alex Hale <fake.alex.hale@millmotivesolutions.com>

evidence.quote: Because we're going to have to reroute some of the product path of travel, and some of it's going to get a little congested.
evidence.speaker: Alex Hale <fake.alex.hale@millmotivesolutions.com>

evidence.quote: So this will be perfect to have it all ironed out and then be able to say, okay, this is even going to help with that.
evidence.speaker: Alex Hale <fake.alex.hale@millmotivesolutions.com>
